meaning: 鐭冲搴刐娌冲寳鐪乚(鏃ц瘧 Shihchiachuang鎴朣hihkiachwang)
examples: Her mother moved to Shijiazhuang subsequently.
I came to Shijiazhuang in 2003. I lived there for over 1 year.
Hebei province is briefly named as ji, with Shijiazhuang as its provincial seat.
State television shows visibility of less than a kilometre in northern Shijiazhuang and other areas.
The worst affected city was Shijiazhuang, capital of northern Hebei province.
